info.title: Webhook
info.description: This API provides Webhook capabilities for the SKY Developer platform.

get.description: Returns a list of subscriptions for your application. These subscriptions are scoped to the Blackbaud Environment authorized by your SKY API access token.

200.description: Returned when the operation succeeds. The response body contains the list of subscriptions.

400.description: Returned when the specified request parameters are not provided.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.

post.description: Creates a subscription in your application. This subscription is scoped to the Blackbaud Environment authorized by your SKY API access token.

requestBody.description: The body of the request. Contains the details for a new subscription request.

400.description: Returned when the specified request parameters are not provided.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.
example.detail: The type Home is not valid for this address.

403.description: Returned when the application does not have sufficient permissions to create the subscription for the event type requested.

example.title: The requested action is forbidden.
example.detail: This application has insufficient scope to create the subscription for the event type requested.

409.description: Returned when the subscription you want to create has already been created.

delete.description: Removes a subscription in your application. The subscription removed is scoped to the Blackbaud Environment authorized by your SKY API access token.

400.description: Returned when the specified request parameters are not provided.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.
example.detail: This operation cannot be done while the subscription is Provisioning. Please wait for subscription to provision. If stuck, the subscription can be deleted after 30 minutes regardless of provisioning state.

404.description: Returned when no subscription exists in your application for the subscription ID provided.

example.title: The requested resource could not be found.

409.description: Returned when the subscription's state doesn't allow it to be deleted.

get.description: Returns subscription information for a specific application and subscription ID. The subscription is scoped to the Blackbaud Environment authorized by your SKY API access token.

200.description: Returned when the operation succeeds. The response body contains the subscription information.

400.description: Returned when the specified request parameters are not provided.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.
example.detail: The type Home is not valid for this address.

404.description: Returned when no subscription exists in your application for the subscription ID provided.

example.title: The requested resource could not be found.

post.description: Sends a test event to your subscription's webhook URL. Use this event to verify that your subscription is configured correctly. This payload uses a special event type, 'com.blackbaud.utility.testpayload.v1', so that your webhook can identify the test.

200.description: Returned when the webhook test payload is successfully delivered to the subscription webhook URL.

400.description: Returned when the specified request parameters are not provided.

example.title: One or more validation errors occurred.
example.detail: Your webhook returned an invalid HTTP status code when sent the test event payload. Received status code: 400. Expected: 200 - 204.

404.description: Returned when no subscription exists in your application for the subscription ID provided. The subscription is scoped to the Blackbaud Environment authorized by your SKY API access token.

example.title: The requested resource could not be found.

type.description:
A URI reference [RFC3986] that identifies the problem type. This specification encourages that, when dereferenced, it provide human-readable documentation for the problem type (e.g., using HTML [W3C.REC-html5-20141028]). When this member is not present, its value is assumed to be "about:blank".

Available values:
typedetail
urn:blackbaud:model-validation-errorA model validation rule was violated, such as a missing required field.
urn:blackbaud:invalid-event-type{0} is not a valid event type
urn:blackbaud:app-max-subscriptions-countThe application {0} is limited to {1} subscriptions per environment {2}
urn:blackbaud:webhook-url-invalidThe webhook URL is invalid
urn:blackbaud:webhook-url-invalid-formatThe webhook URL is not properly formatted and fully qualified. The URL scheme (HTTPS) must be specified.
urn:blackbaud:webhook-url-invalid-schemaThe webhook URL is not HTTPS
urn:blackbaud:webhook-url-handshake-missing-origin-headerReceived an unexpected 'WebHook-Allowed-Origin' header value from your webhook URL when performing the CloudEvent's Abuse Protection handshake. The header must equal 'eventgrid.azure.net'. Review our Webhook API documentation to learn more. https://developer.blackbaud.com/skyapi/apis/webhook
urn:blackbaud:webhook-url-handshake-invalid-status-codeReceived an invalid HTTPS status code from your webhook URL when performing the CloudEvent's Abuse Protection handshake with your webhook URL. Review our Webhook API documentation to learn more. https://developer.blackbaud.com/skyapi/apis/webhook
urn:blackbaud:webhook-url-unreachableWe were unable to reach the specified webhook URL. Please check the URL and try again.
urn:blackbaud:webhook-event-timeoutYour webhook failed to respond in 30 seconds to the test event payload. A webhook must respond to webhook events within 30 seconds. After 30 seconds, we will terminate the event request and retry later with exponential backoff (up to 9 times).
urn:blackbaud:webhook-event-terminatedThe connection to your webhook was unexpectedly terminated during the request.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. It SHOULD NOT change from occurrence to occurrence of the problem, except for purposes of localization (e.g., using proactive content negotiation; see [RFC7231], Section 3.4).

status.description: The HTTP status code ([RFC7231], Section 6) generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

trace_id.description: A request ID that can be provided to Blackbaud Support that may help with further troubleshooting.

span_id.description: A request ID that can be provided to Blackbaud Support that may help with further troubleshooting.

CreateSubscriptionBadRequestResponse.description: A machine-readable format for specifying errors in HTTP API responses based on https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7807.

Available values:

Available values:

urn:blackbaud:webhook-event-terminatedThe connection to your webhook was unexpectedly terminated during the request.
urn:blackbaud:subscription-not-provisionedOnly Provisioned subscriptions can be sent an event.
